reason: The preregistered carrier B with doubled spins [1,3,3,5] and channels E=F=[2,4] does not produce an orthogonal two-channel recoupling matrix under the declared q-6j construction.

claim_firewall.allowed: The original preregistered comparison is ill-posed because carrier B fails its declared carrier-validity gate.

evidence_rule: No statement from the Gemini advisory report is used as evidence.
